form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Leap To Fame at Menangle over 1609m in a No NR on March 7 at $41. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Ubetcha Tigerpie at Penrith over 2525m in a G3 No NR on March 20 at $1.50. Progressing well. Has been racking up the country cup wins in Australia of late and draws to be competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Leap To Fame at Menangle over 1609m in a No NR on March 7 at $41. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead passing the 1200m.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4 m fourth behind Leap To Fame at Menangle over 1609m G1 No NR last start. Before that was beaten a neck second again at Menangle in No NR on March 7. The good draw could see him find the front and he is hard to get past from that position.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to obtain the lead passing the 1800m.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd (Fr7) over 1609m at this track, beaten 3 m by The Janitor (1:51.40) on April 2 at $9.70. Two runs back 2nd (Fr5) over 2200m at Alexandra Park beaten 2 m by The Lazarus Effect (2:40.60) on March 20 at $4.40. Has a great record here including a win in this race two years ago so could be competitive from a good draw.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 10 m by The Janitor (1:51.40) on April 2 at $9.50. Before that 4th (Fr6) over 2200m at Alexandra Park, beaten 14 m by The Lazarus Effect (2:40.60) on March 20 at $3.70. Needs to find his best.

form.formComment: Racing consistently with minor placings at his last two starts at this course. Placed last start 2nd (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten a neck by The Janitor (1:51.40) on April 2 at $4.30. Before that 2nd (Fr4) over 1700m at Alexandra Park beaten 3 m by The Lazarus Effect (2:) on March 13 at $7.10. Racing consistently but the big guns look to have his measure.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by The Janitor (1:51.40) on April 2 at $4. At the start before good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 2200m at Alexandra Park, beaten 5.5 m by The Lazarus Effect (2:40.60) on March 20 at $16.10. Place best.

form.formComment: Champion pacer. Posted a big 5 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Albion Park (2:29.60) beating District Attorney in 4yo+ No NR on March 28 at $1.04. Two runs back won by a head as favourite (Fr4) at Menangle (1:49.00) beating The Janitor in G1 No NR on March 14 at $2.70. Last year's winner who returns in terrific form including another Miracle Mile win last month so can go back to back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked racing into the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 1609m at Menangle, beaten 9 m by Leap To Fame (1:49.00) in G1 No NR on March 14 at $23. Before that, 9th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, at the bell was leading 2.5 beaten 8 m by The Janitor (1:49.30) in No NR on March 7 at $3. Mixing his form this time in but a repeat of last year's New Zealand Cup winning performance would take him close.

form.formComment: Going well. Last start by a neck as favourite (Fr6) at this track (1:51.40) beating Sooner The Bettor in on April 2 at $2.20. Too good here last week and pushed Leap To Fame in the Miracle Mile prior so has strong claims.
